ksa_text: Skill in AI fairness assessment and bias detection, including application of fairness metrics, measurement of algorithmic bias across demographic groups, and evaluation of bias mitigation effectiveness.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Risk Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Deputy CDO. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Deputy CDO roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Risk Management is not a standard competency expectation for Deputy CDO. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Deputy CDO competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Risk Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Deputy CDO. All passes support exclusion.
